title: tragia cordata
intro: Tragia cordata, also known as the heart-leaved spurge, is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tragia cordata include treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Tragia cordata can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to treat various health issues.
